title: Worker Session
description: A single worker session entry in the runtime session registry. Lives under .floe/state/sessions.json. This is runtime bookkeeping only — not the durable source of truth.

role.description: Which canonical role this worker is running

featureId.description: The feature this session is scoped to

epicId.description: The epic containing the feature (denormalised for convenience)

releaseId.description: The release containing the epic (denormalised for convenience)

roleContentPath.description: Path to the canonical role definition injected at session start

error.description: Last error message if status is failed

metadata.description: Runtime metadata (e.g. thread IDs, conversation history pointers)
